message:
test(vdbe): add test-only sideband MakeRecord materialization counter

Adds a `#[cfg(test)]` atomic counter
`FSQLITE_VDBE_MAKE_RECORD_SIDEBAND_MATERIALIZATIONS_TOTAL` that
increments every time the VDBE engine has to fall back to materializing
a MakeRecord sideband value into an `Arc<[u8]>` blob register. Together
with the new `reset_vdbe_test_sideband_materialization_count` /
`vdbe_test_sideband_materialization_count_snapshot` helpers this lets
tests assert "no sideband materialization happened" or "exactly N
materializations happened" for regression coverage around the
MakeRecord fast path optimization.

All of the new code is gated on `#[cfg(test)]` — the production build
is unchanged and carries no extra atomic bookkeeping. The increment
site is inside the existing fallback branch in the
`make_record_sideband_reg != 0` handler where the buffered record bytes
have to become an `Arc<[u8]>` blob, so the counter corresponds exactly
to the "slow path taken" condition the regression tests want to guard.
